title: Partner%20CRM%20System%20for%20Garanti%20Pension%20and%20Life%20%20Case%20Study%20May%202017
content:
Case Study  
 
 
 
 
 
Dynamics CRM based Customer Services 
System for leading Financial Services Provider  
 
Garanti  Pension and Life Improves Quality of Customer 
Service, Improves Sales Efficiency and Builds Competitive Edge 
with CRM based Customer Services System  
 
  
 
 
 
  


 
Copyright © 201 5 Techno Brain. All rights reserved.  
www.technobraingroup.com  Customer:  
Garanti Pension and Life, a subsidiary of 
Garanti  Bank of Turkey, offers pension 
schemes & life insurance products  
Industry:  
Private – Financial Services  
Business Situation:  
Garanti  was looking for a flexible 
solution to deliver outstanding service 
to customers with shorter time -to-
market and lower total cost of 
ownership.  
Solution:  
Techno Brain deployed MS Dynamics 
CRM to increase process efficiency, 
boost sales and improve customer  
service.  
Benefits : 
 Improved process efficiency 
through better processes to 
search and index data  
 Higher quality of service and 
reduced turnaround time for 
customer enquiries  
 Increased sales efficiency and 
greater rates of cross selling and 
upselling  Dynamics CRM based Customer Services System 
for lead ing Financial Services Provider  
Customer Profile  
Garanti Pension and Life founded in 1992, is a subsidiary of Garanti Bank of 
Turkey, which offers pension schemes and life insurance products. The 
company added private pensions to its portfolio in 2002. Garanti Pension 
and Life serves millions of customers with a mission to "stake a claim on the 
happy future of stakeholders, guide them, add value and make them feel 
assured." Vision of Garanti is “To become Europe’s best Private Pension & 
Life Insurance Company”.  
Business Situation  
In an increasingly competitive marketplace, Garanti Pension & Life has seen 
a large increase in its financial services customers, due to several factors, 
including Turkey’s steadily rising gross domestic product and higher 
disposable income. Dramatic refor m in Turkey’s state pension system over 
the last five years has led to more and more people moving towards 
private pension schemes. This has resulted in increased competition among 
private players. Garanti Pension and Life offered a host of new offers 
targeting a public that was keen on taking advantage of private pensions.  
Increased competition and volume of customers placed a great strain on 
Garanti's  system and processes. The company wanted to focus on 
customer service, and build a competitive edge with it in a crowded 
marketplace. With multiple service offerings, the company held information 
of customers on disparate systems, and had a problem consol idating 
customer data into one screen. The other challenge was usability and steep 
learning curve - Garanti's large workforce of sales and service call centers 
could not be trained for long periods during a transition to a new solution.  
Solution  
Garanti in tended to have a flexible system that will enable them to deliver 
an outstanding service to customers with shorter time -to-market and lower 
total cost of ownership. Also, they wanted the new solution to be adapt 
quickly to the needs of their business. Afte r evaluating various solutions 
available in market from different providers, Garanti selected Microsoft 
Dynamics CRM based Customer Service Solution delivered by leading 
Microsoft Gold Certified Partner, Techno Brain.  
We conducted a thorough & detailed stu dy of Garanti's business 
requirements and the unique challenges posed by its huge customer base 
and deployed Dynamics CRM based Customer Services System. This helped 
Garanti to easily and quickly consolidate customer information from 
disparate systems enab ling customer service center executives to respond 
to customer queries and manage sales applications effectively.  
Major features of Dynamics CRM based Customer Services System :  
 Information from disparate systems is consolidated in Microsoft 
SQL Server® 20 05 data management software  
 Microsoft SQL Server Integration Services supports data integration 
and workflow applications that deliver customer information to an 
easy-to-use interface   

 
Copyright © 201 5 Techno Brain. All rights reserved.  
www.technobraingroup.com  Dynamics CRM based Customer Services System 
for leading Financial Services Provider  
 
 CRM system enables Garanti to have a 360° view of individual customers and the business  
 Automatic escalation of incomplete actions ensures that customer service is never neglected  
 Automatic business processes set up along with the CRM have cut down manual processes and 
made the business operations more productive  
 With the Advanced Find feat ure in Microsoft Dynamics CRM, employees can search hundreds of 
thousands of customers by age, contributions, and location  
 Employees find the solution easy to use. All content, including workflow, is organized on a single 
page with the familiar Microsoft look and feel  
 Automatic escalation of incomplete actions ensures that customer service is never neglected  
Technologies  
Microsoft Dynamics CRM, Microsoft SQL Server 2005, Microsoft SQL Server 2008  
Benefits:  
Deployment of CRM based customer services solution helped the Garanti to increase its market share by a 
significant amount in an extremely competitive market. In addition, the quality of customer service has been 
transformed throughout the pensions and lif e insurance product lifecycle. Garanti Pension and Life has been 
able to update the solution to accommodate improved and innovative processes, including sophisticated 
customer segmentation that identifies high net worth customers and ensures that they rece ive the highest 
level of service.  
Key benefits of CRM based Customer Services System:  
 Improved cross and upselling rates. The average contribution rate per customer a month has 
increased by almost 43 per cent  
 Reduced average resolution time of customer enq uiries by 75 per cent. Turnaround time has fallen 
from three days to just over one day  
 Sales employees have become more effective in managing their daily activities resulting in 
enhanced productivity, improved customer satisfaction and increased efficiency  by 25%  
 Enhanced search capabilities through Advanced Find Feature. Garanti finds customers quickly by 
age, contributions and location.
